title: Chest Locker
description: Lock any container so only you can access it.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ff3fe3855cb30f73e656d9ef988f79f86a36d7c_0.webp)


## 📖 Description A secure method to store items and lock them with a key of your choice!
This datapack operates seamlessly in both singleplayer and multiplayer modes. ## 📦 How to use v3.0.0+ To lock any container, simply look at it and execute the command `/trigger ChestLocker` while holding an item that you've renamed in your main hand. If the container isn't already locked, it will secure it with the key you're holding, making it accessible only with that specific key. Item count can also be part of the key.
Use `/function locker:deleting/give_remover` and right click any locked container with the given item to remove that lock. You need operator permission to use this!

### ⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTE Item durability is included in the locking system! This means that if you lock an item with x amount of durability, you can only use that item to unlock that container when it has the same amount of durability!
### Extra security All locked containers are fire proof, creeper and tnt explosion resistant.

## Example You can lock a container with `16x cobblestone renamed to "Key 826423"`.
This container can now only be opened when the player holds 16x cobblestone that is renamed to "Key 826423".
To open a lock on a container, hold the correct key and right-click the container. The lock on the container is now opened and will lock itself again after 5 seconds or after opening the container, ensuring the safety of the container's items.
To remove a lock on a container, hold the correct key and left-click the container. The lock on the container is now removed and can now be locked again with `/trigger ChestLocker`.
